---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to happen? Be specific about the expected behaviour.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Impact

- **Service(s) affected:** notification-service / template-service / delivery-tracker

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's scope
- [ ] I am willing to help implement it (if applicable)
